_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 78% August 2024 bottom analog and expanding stablecoin reserves support a tentative move up into early-recovery skepticism, but macro headwinds from elevated VIX and funding keep conviction low.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both agree direction is UP, but Analyst hedges with low conviction and explicit invalidation conditions while Narrative is more decisively bullish; Analyst's predicted_phase is Hope (two rungs up), which violates the ±1 rung rule, so consensus is pulled back to Disbelief.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks $68,500 with sustained ETF inflows and funding stays below 0.015%
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC closes below $63,000 with VIX spiking above 20 and funding flipping negative
